isolation.context: No special isolation needed. You may start the api server using pnpm scripts or check if it starts successfully without errors.

assertions.title: NestJS app bootstraps without runtime errors

steps.expected: Server starts successfully and outputs 'Application running on: http://localhost:3333' with no stack traces
steps.observed: Server compiled and started successfully, outputted 'Application running on: http://localhost:3333', and no unhandled exceptions or stack traces were observed in the console

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed (VAL-BOOT-002: NestJS app bootstraps successfully without errors)
